candidate_findings.finding_label: Potential progression break from boat to city
candidate_findings.claim: In Scene A, Rawn appears to commit to securing the line and preparing to move past landing, but Scene B shows him immediately in the city without a transition.

evidence_spans.span_text: Rawn helped secure the line and said nothing more to the captain than was required.
The city received them without ceremony.

candidate_findings.uncertainty_note: The lack of detailed transition from the boat to the city may be intentional, suggesting a rapid progression or an off-page journey.
candidate_findings.review_note: Verify whether there is any implied or off-page narrative that explains Rawn's quick transition from the boat landing to being in the city.

overall_run_note: Identified a potential progression break due to lack of explicit transition between scenes.
